_comment: Single source of truth for Mabu's LLMs. run-llm.ps1 reads file+template to launch llama-server; pipecat_bot.py reads stop (keyed by the LLM_MODEL name) so the right stop token travels with each model instead of being hard-coded. 'file' is resolved relative to pc-brain/models/ unless it's an absolute path. 'template': '' means trust the GGUF's embedded template (--jinja); a name like 'chatml' forces a built-in template.

rocinante.note: TheDrummer Mistral-Nemo 12B, decensored RP. Its embedded template is a non-renderable name ('mistral-v7-tekken') so we force ChatML; Nemo's tokenizer then leaks a literal <|im_end|>, hence the stop.

qwen.note: Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct. Embedded template is good (ChatML family) -> --jinja.
